text: Stepping through these sleek, glass-paneled halls and into a vibrant, immersive exhibition, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and introspection. Here, the boundaries between human ingenuity and intelligent machines invite me to ponder not just how we build and interact, but who we become in the process. The atmosphere is modern and inviting, yet I am keenly aware of the weight of progress echoing around me—a silent, persistent question: how will our creations change us?
